title: Chestnut and Mellow Mushroom Stir Fry
description: A simple and delicious Chinese-inspired stir fry made with chestnuts, mellow mushrooms, and spring onions. Perfect as a quick dinner option.
instructions: Heat argentinian olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add sliced mellow mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Add sliced chestnuts and cook for another 2-3 minutes.
Add chopped spring onions and grated ginger, stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add soy sauce, sugar, and sesame oil, stir-fry until the sauce is bubbly and slightly thickened.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve immediately over rice or noodles.
